commands.command: mkdir -p apps/docs/static/css/files apps/docs/static/css/fonts && cp -r node_modules/@fontsource/space-grotesk/files/* apps/docs/static/css/files/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r node_modules/@fontsource/jetbrains-mono/files/* apps/docs/static/css/files/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r node_modules/@fontsource/material-symbols-outlined/files/* apps/docs/static/css/files/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r node_modules/primeicons/fonts/* apps/docs/static/css/fonts/ 2>/dev/null || true
cp libs/pixora/llms.txt apps/docs/static/ && cp libs/pixora/llms-full.txt apps/docs/static/ && pnpm exec astro build --root apps/docs --outDir ../../dist/apps/docs --base /

mkdir -p apps/docs/static/css/files apps/docs/static/css/fonts && cp -r node_modules/@fontsource/space-grotesk/files/* apps/docs/static/css/files/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r node_modules/@fontsource/jetbrains-mono/files/* apps/docs/static/css/files/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r node_modules/@fontsource/material-symbols-outlined/files/* apps/docs/static/css/files/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r node_modules/primeicons/fonts/* apps/docs/static/css/fonts/ 2>/dev/null || true
cp libs/pixora/llms.txt apps/docs/static/ && cp libs/pixora/llms-full.txt apps/docs/static/ && pnpm exec astro build --root apps/docs --outDir ../../dist/apps/docs --base /

options.command: rm -rf apps/docs/static/examples/space-invaders && pnpm nx run space-invaders:build:docs --skipNxCache && mkdir -p apps/docs/static/examples/space-invaders && cp -r dist/apps/space-invaders/* apps/docs/static/examples/space-invaders/ && rm -rf dist/apps/space-invaders
